feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)

entry.title: No more
entry.summary:
Author: ForgottenOne201

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,087Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 75

Summary: After the climax of actions with gerard circumstances push stiles to discover a truce about himself specifically his mother’s bloodline. New complications arise when a pack of alphas arrives in town and between learning more about himself and staying alive stiles falls for a certain grumpy alpha.

entry.title: My Name is Ours at Night
entry.summary:
Author: strawberry_chicken

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,714Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 39

Summary: (End season 2) After a ritual gone wrong, Stiles should be dead. Instead, he wakes up with a hole in his body and something inside him—something wrong, something hungry. Derek knows there's a threat in town. He just didn't expect it to look like Stiles.

entry.title: The Log of the Triskelion, Struck Pages: On the Taste of Salt, On the Weight of Amber Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: am0rawr

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,498Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: From the depths of the sea, where songs are not fashioned to seduce but to devour souls, Captain Derek Hale retrieves a treasure no chart ever promised. Stiles arrives wrapped in shattered glass and silences; eyes of ancient amber, a tale of a lost prince too fragile to be believed, too beautiful to be questioned. In the salt and gunpowder weeks that follow, Derek learns that certain creatures need no cages. They hunt with abyssal patience, weaving confessions and cold caresses until the heart of the prey ripens of its own free will. In the end, only one question will remain, suspended like sea-foam upon the waves: when a predator wears the skin of innocence and offers its own throat, who is the devourer and who is the feast? The sea will tell no tales. But it will keep the secret.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Derek Hale and the Secrets of the Fae
entry.summary:
Author: am0rawr

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,712Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 12

Summary: The door in the tree should not exist. With hunters on his trail and wolfsbane burning through his veins, Derek Hale has no time to question impossibilities; he forces it open and falls into the dark. When he wakes, the world is different: a ceiling of living branches, light with no source, and a strange fae with bluish skin chattering as he tends to Derek’s wounds. Stiles collects lichens, wears flowers that shift with moods Derek cannot read, and his wings scatter light across the walls. He is chaotic, eccentric, entirely other, and carries a beauty that belongs to no world Derek has ever known. Derek never asked to be saved. Never asked for the endless garden, or for the way his heart stumbles whenever those eyes linger on him. But the Fae Realm has laws: guests must rest, and no one dies without permission. Leaving, Derek is learning, may be another matter. When he returns to Beacon Hills, he does not return alone. The pack has questions. The hunters still circle. And the fae at his side smiles like he knows something no one else does. No one in Beacon Hills knows the Fair Folk. Least of all Derek.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: To Safe Your Life
entry.summary:
Author: DoEScasTIElLove

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,935Chapters: 3/11Kudos: 30

Summary: Scott has been turned into a werewolf just before their last year of high school. Managing him on full moons without any help turns almost fatal for Stiles until a dark, brooding wolf swoops in and saves his life. Apparently, he had to bite him to do that, not transforming him but bonding them together as mates.As it turns out, the Hale pack is alive and thriving, and the hunters are after them, but how could Stiles concentrate on that. He has to figure out what being werewolf mated to Derek actually means.

entry.title: Don’t go where I can’t
entry.summary:
Author: WhoSaidImFin

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,863Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 23

Summary: Stiles and Derek have been married for two years, and for once, life in Beacon Hills is quiet — until Stiles is brutally attacked while investigating something near a lake and left fighting for his life. Derek is forced to watch helplessly as he’s put on a ventilator, slips into a coma, and nearly dies, and even when Stiles wakes, the wounds don’t heal normally and the nightmares don’t stop. As recovery turns into something far more complicated, both of them struggle with fear, guilt, and the reality that almost losing each other changes everything.

entry.title: The Soul of the Wolf: Season unknown, Episode Classified
entry.summary:
Author: FaithWarrior

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,418Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 39

Summary: When a case turns up some odd connection to something Tony learned about years before he joined NCIS the teams investigation takes a turn for the weird. Thankfully Tony has someone he can call to assist with the clues that are being laid out.AKA: NCIS gets a case that involves the supernatural and is joined by some of our favorite Teen Wolf Characters to save the day. A fluffy lore dump with character interactions and fun dialogue.

entry.title: Tangled, Ravelled, and Undogged
entry.summary:
Author: Stout

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 47,036Chapters: 9/9Kudos: 84

Summary: After making several mistakes in a row, Stiles finds himself stuck in a haunted manor in the middle of a cursed wood, and faced with a terrifying, monstrous Beast demanding custody of some unlucky (and possibly beloved) scapegoat in exchange for Stiles' freedom. (But the Beast never said that Stiles couldn't visit.)

entry.title: The Death Warrant
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,425Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 38

Summary: Stiles is determined to walk away from his destiny. He refuses to bow down to a monster. But against a dynasty whose power is vaster than the continent, how far he will be able to go?   I suck at writing summary, or writing in general. This fic is dark and pretty depressing. There is going to be violence, death and all the bad things you can thing. and i am pretty sure it won't have a happy ending. The writer is miserable, thus have decided to take it out on here. So read if you feel like you can stomach such plots.

entry.title: Unexpected Steadiness
entry.summary:
Author: StilinskiStories

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,512Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 12

Summary: After everything they survived to get here, Stiles expects relief to come easily.Instead, the days after Eli’s birth are quiet, overwhelming, and full of unfamiliar fear. The certainty everyone promised doesn’t arrive all at once, only exhaustion, doubt, and the terrifying weight of being responsible for something so small.As Stiles struggles with the distance between loving his son and believing he can keep him safe, Derek stays. Watches. Learns. Holds the line when Stiles can’t.This isn’t the story of monsters or rituals or saving the world.It’s the story of what comes after and how love learns to breathe.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: An Endless Road to (re)Discover
entry.summary:
Author: evvrythingisawesome

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,234Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 19

Summary: Sheriff Stilinski recovers from his injury and tries to keep the pack together in the absence of their Alpha; Chris Argent struggles with guilt over his role in the pack's recent troubles; Teal'c tries to balance his responsibilities to the pack with his obligations to the Free Jaffa Nation and the SGC; Daniel Jackson supports Derek through his quest for the truth of his lost Hale ancestor and his search for his sister.

entry.title: Of Wolves and Penguin Promises
entry.summary:
Author: WolfFeller

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,871Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 7

Summary: A year after promising Isabelle a real penguin, Peter decides World Penguin Day is the day to make good on it. The law disagrees. What follows involves failed wildlife acquisition, sponsored little blue penguins, gift shop overindulgence, and a brood that somehow gets even fluffier.

entry.title: A Very Stilinski Affair
entry.summary:
Author: Christina786

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 48,556Chapters: 8/14Kudos: 18

Summary: Derek frowned. “You Stilinskis really have to be that honest?”She shrugged. “What’s the point in being secretive and mysterious?”Now Derek grinned “Oh, you should meet my uncle, you’d hate him.” This is based on a post on tumblr in which Stiles is afraid that Derek might fall for his sibling once he meets them. It kind of got out of hand and I started indulging in some morally gray but not evil Peter. Basically, Peter falls for Stiles' sister instead, because they kind of bond over their different but slightly similar traumas and it turns out Stiles' sister has been hiding a few bodies in her closet.

entry.title: The Clean Fight
entry.summary:
Author: Glyphemum

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 74,533Chapters: 12/12Kudos: 12

Summary: Welcome back to the campaign, where things are now officially no longer just bad polling and emotional repression. Part Two is where the public race and the hidden supernatural threat start crashing into each other: Lydia investigates the leak, Gerard begins tightening the trap, Kate gets sharper and crueler, the pack has to step further out of the shadows, and Derek keeps trying to win clean while everyone around him wonders whether clean is going to be enough. Stiles, unfortunately for his blood pressure, starts understanding Derek far too well, including the parts Derek is trying hardest to hide. There will be blackmail, wolfsbane, moral lines, terrible strategic options, the slowest of slow burns, and eventually one very important debate. Basically: welcome to the part where everyone’s secrets become campaign liabilities.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The nogitsune
entry.summary:
Author: UrNewtmas_ObsessedGirl

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,801Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 87

Summary: When Stiles goes missing for three weeks and suddenly shows up at the loft, there's something off. His scent. Everything. And when his eyes glow gold instead of his usual brown, Derek knows something is horribly wrong. I suck at summary's.Tags will be updated as the story gets updated.

entry.title: the burning hill
entry.summary:
Author: mieczystiles

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 118,735Chapters: 5/7Kudos: 122

Summary: Just then, another rumble reverberates around. Stiles looks up, startled, but it’s not the clouds. It’s a wolf. It stares right at him from between the two trees that flank the clearing, eyes glowing, a vibrant shade of blue in the relative darkness.
